title: RevitFilePreview
description: RevitFilePreview: Wrapper for Revit family file (.rfa) that stores basic information about it such as family category, familiy type names etc.

Path.description: Path to the Revit family file wrapped by this object.

CategoryName.description: Name of the Revit category, to which belongs the family wrapped by this object.

FamilyName.description: Name of the Revit family wrapped by this object.

FamilyTypeNames.description: Names of the family types contained within the Revit family wrapped by this object.

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
